languages.text: {n}Недовольно зарычав, Соломон опускает оружие — но не выпускает из рук. Он свирепо и упрямо повторяет:{/n} "Я их видел".
{n}With a disgruntled growl, Solomorne lowers his weapon — but does not let go of it. He snarls fiercely and stubbornly,{/n} "I saw them."
languages.original_text: {n}Недовольно зарычав, Соломон опускает оружие — но не выпускает из рук. Он свирепо и упрямо повторяет:{/n} "Я их видел".

traits.locale_text: {n}With a disgruntled growl, Solomorne lowers his weapon — but does not let go of it. He snarls fiercely and stubbornly,{/n} "I saw them."
{n}With a disgruntled growl, Solomorne lowers his weapon — but does not let go of it. He snarls fiercely and stubbornly,{/n} "I saw them."
{n}With a disgruntled growl, Solomorne lowers his weapon — but does not let go of it. He snarls fiercely and stubbornly,{/n} "I saw them."
{n}With a disgruntled growl, Solomorne lowers his weapon — but does not let go of it. He snarls fiercely and stubbornly,{/n} "I saw them."
{n}With a disgruntled growl, Solomorne lowers his weapon — but does not let go of it. He snarls fiercely and stubbornly,{/n} "I saw them."

languages.text: {n}Avec un grondement mécontent, Solomorne baisse son arme, sans toutefois la lâcher.{/n} « Je les ai vus, » {n}grogne-t-il obstinément.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With a disgruntled growl, Solomorne lowers his weapon — but does not let go of it. He snarls fiercely and stubbornly,{/n} "I saw them."

traits.locale_text: {n}Avec un grondement mécontent, Solomorne baisse son arme, sans toutefois la lâcher.{/n} « Je les ai vus, » {n}grogne-t-il obstinément.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ソロモーンは不機嫌そうにうなり声をあげながら、武器を下ろす。だが手放しはしなかった。彼は激しく、そして頑なに繰り返した。{/n}「奴らを見たんだ」
languages.original_text: {n}With a disgruntled growl, Solomorne lowers his weapon — but does not let go of it. He snarls fiercely and stubbornly,{/n} "I saw them."

traits.locale_text: {n}ソロモーンは不機嫌そうにうなり声をあげながら、武器を下ろす。だが手放しはしなかった。彼は激しく、そして頑なに繰り返した。{/n}「奴らを見たんだ」

languages.text: {n}Con un gruñido contrariado, Solomorne baja el arma sin soltarla. Testarudo, refunfuña:{/n} «Los he visto».
languages.original_text: {n}With a disgruntled growl, Solomorne lowers his weapon — but does not let go of it. He snarls fiercely and stubbornly,{/n} "I saw them."

traits.locale_text: {n}Con un gruñido contrariado, Solomorne baja el arma sin soltarla. Testarudo, refunfuña:{/n} «Los he visto».

languages.text: {n}索罗蒙不满地低吼着，放下了武器，但并没有把武器收起来。他凶狠而固执地咆哮着。{/n}“我看到他们了。”
languages.original_text: {n}With a disgruntled growl, Solomorne lowers his weapon — but does not let go of it. He snarls fiercely and stubbornly,{/n} "I saw them."

traits.locale_text: {n}索罗蒙不满地低吼着，放下了武器，但并没有把武器收起来。他凶狠而固执地咆哮着。{/n}“我看到他们了。”

languages.text: {n}Solomorne, huysuz bir homurtuyla silahını indirse de bırakmıyor. Öfkeden deliye dönmüş hâlde, inatla âdeta hırlıyor.{/n} "Onları gördüm."
languages.original_text: {n}With a disgruntled growl, Solomorne lowers his weapon — but does not let go of it. He snarls fiercely and stubbornly,{/n} "I saw them."

traits.locale_text: {n}Solomorne, huysuz bir homurtuyla silahını indirse de bırakmıyor. Öfkeden deliye dönmüş hâlde, inatla âdeta hırlıyor.{/n} "Onları gördüm."

languages.text: {n}Mit einem unwilligen Knurren senkt Solomorne seine Waffe ... lässt sie aber nicht los. "Ich habe sie nicht gesehen", wiederholt er störrisch.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}With a disgruntled growl, Solomorne lowers his weapon — but does not let go of it. He snarls fiercely and stubbornly,{/n} "I saw them."

traits.locale_text: {n}Mit einem unwilligen Knurren senkt Solomorne seine Waffe ... lässt sie aber nicht los. "Ich habe sie nicht gesehen", wiederholt er störrisch.
